title: Oversampling
summary: Oversampling is a glossary node in the AI/ML learning graph. Compare it with SMOTE (Synthetic Minority Oversampling Technique) and SMOTEBoost (Synthetic Minority Oversampling + Boosting). It opens into Oversampling Techniques and SMOTE (Synthetic Minority Oversampling Technique).
